# Load the JSON files

# Define normalization
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             [\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]
                             """, re.VERBOSE)
tatweel = re.compile(r'ـ+')

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    t = str(text)
    # Normalize Arabic letters: unify hamza forms
    replacements = {
        '\u0622':'ا', # alef with maddah
        '\u0623':'ا', # alef with hamza above
        '\u0625':'ا', # alef with hamza below
        '\u0671':'ا', # alif wasla
        '\u06C0':'ه', # maybe not
    }
    for a,b in replacements.items():
        t = t.replace(a,b)
    # remove diacritics
    t = arabic_diacritics.sub('', t)
    # remove tatweel
    t = tatweel.sub('', t)
    # remove punctuation and non-letter/digit
    # keep Arabic letters and numbers and spaces
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    # lowercase not needed for Arabic
    return t

full_sub = "إن الله أرسل رسلاً إلى كل قوم، فمنهم من كفر"
snippet = "إن الله أر...نهم من كفر"

n_full = normalize_ar(full_sub)
n_snip = normalize_ar(snippet)
n_full, n_snip

# Prepare normalized versions of hadith texts and search
def normalize_ar2(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    t = str(text)
    # replace hamza forms with bare alef
    for a,b in {'\u0622':'ا','\u0623':'ا','\u0625':'ا','\u0671':'ا'}.items():
        t = t.replace(a,b)
    # remove diacritics
    t = arabic_diacritics.sub('', t)
    t = tatweel.sub('', t)
    # replace punctuation with space (including Arabic comma etc.)
    # Keep Arabic letters and numbers and spaces
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    return t

n_full = normalize_ar2(full_sub)
n_snip = normalize_ar2(snippet)
n_full, n_snip

import unicodedata
def normalize_ar3(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    t = str(text)
    for a,b in {'\u0622':'ا','\u0623':'ا','\u0625':'ا','\u0671':'ا'}.items():
        t = t.replace(a,b)
    t = arabic_diacritics.sub('', t)
    t = tatweel.sub('', t)
    # replace punctuation chars with space
    t = ''.join(ch if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('P') else ' ' for ch in t)
    # remove other non Arabic/number letters? We'll keep letters and numbers
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', t)
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    return t

n_full = normalize_ar3(full_sub)
n_snip = normalize_ar3(snippet)
n_full, n_snip

from collections import Counter
# Compute token F1 for each candidate
def token_f1(a, b):
    # a and b are normalized strings
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    set_a = ta
    set_b = tb
    # compute overlap counts
    ca = Counter(set_a)
    cb = Counter(set_b)
    common = sum(min(ca[w], cb[w]) for w in set(ca.keys()) & set(cb.keys()))
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / sum(ca.values())
    recall = common / sum(cb.values())
    if precision+recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1, common, len(ta), len(tb)
    
scores = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hdata):
    matn = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    nm = normalize_ar3(matn)
    f1_res = token_f1(nm, n_full)
    if f1_res and f1_res[0]>0:
        f1, common, la, lb = f1_res
        scores.append((f1, common, la, lb, i, rec))
# sort by f1 descending
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (-x[0], -x[1]))
len(scores_sorted), scores_sorted[:20]

# compute max token_f1 and top candidate details
max_f1 = 0
best = None
for i, rec in enumerate(hdata):
    matn = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    nm = normalize_ar3(matn)
    f1_res = token_f1(nm, n_full)
    if f1_res and f1_res[0] > max_f1:
        max_f1 = f1_res[0]
        best = (i, rec, nm, f1_res)
max_f1, best[0] if best else None

import difflib
max_ratio=0
best_ratio=None
for i, rec in enumerate(hdata):
    matn = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    nm = normalize_ar3(matn)
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, nm, n_full).ratio()
    if ratio>max_ratio:
        max_ratio = ratio
        best_ratio=(i, rec, nm, ratio)
max_ratio, best_ratio[0]

i, rec, nm, ratio = best_ratio
rec['Matn'][:400], nm, ratio
